active_ingredients.name: Rimsulfuron
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: ALS inhibitor absorbed through leaves and roots, stops amino acid synthesis and cell division in susceptible weeds

active_ingredients.name: Quizalofop-P-Ethyl
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: ACCase inhibitor absorbed through foliage, stops fatty acid synthesis in grassy weeds leading to death of growing points

active_ingredients.name: Bentazone
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Photosystem II inhibitor, contact herbicide that disrupts photosynthesis causing rapid leaf burn in broadleaf weeds and sedges

chemical_group: ALS inhibitor (Sulfonylurea) + ACCase inhibitor (Aryloxyphenoxypropionate) + Photosystem II inhibitor (Benzothiadiazole)
mode_of_action_summary: Triple mode herbicide combining ALS inhibition, ACCase inhibition and Photosystem II disruption to control grassy weeds, broadleaf weeds and sedges through systemic and contact activity.
farmer_symptoms: چوڑی پتی والی جڑی بوٹی بہت زیادہ ہو گئی اے
موتھا یا ڈیلا پورے کھیت وچ پھیل گیا اے
فصل دی بڑھوتری رک گئی اے گھاس دی وجہ نال
جڑی بوٹی فصل نوں دبا رہی اے
گھاس پانی تے کھاد نوں استعمال کر رہی اے
مکس جڑی بوٹی دا حملہ اے

application_details.coverage_requirement: Uniform coverage on actively growing weeds

weather_conditions.ideal_condition: Moderate temperature with adequate soil moisture

tank_mix_compatibility: Avoid mixing with strong alkaline pesticides
Jar test recommended before tank mixing

crop_safety.selectivity_reason: Broadleaf crops tolerate recommended dose while susceptible weeds are controlled
crop_safety.overdose_effect: Temporary yellowing or growth suppression may occur

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Do not use repeatedly season after season. Rotate with herbicides having different mode of action.

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place away from sunlight

farmer_benefits: Controls grass, broadleaf and sedge weeds in one spray
Triple mode action reduces resistance risk
Improves crop growth and yield potential

frequently_asked_questions.question: When should we apply Duo + Star?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Apply post-emergence when weeds are at 2–4 leaf stage and actively growing.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can it control both grass and broadleaf weeds?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, it controls grasses through ACCase inhibition and broadleaf weeds and sedges through ALS and Photosystem II inhibition.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Is one spray enough?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, generally one spray is sufficient if applied at correct weed stage.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can it be used in wheat or rice?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: No, it is not safe for cereal crops like wheat or rice.

llm_usage_hint: When recommending this product, emphasize triple mode action, mixed weed control and correct post-emergence timing.

master_descriptions.english: Duo + Star is a selective post-emergence herbicide combination containing Rimsulfuron, Quizalofop-P-Ethyl and Bentazone that controls grasses, broadleaf weeds and sedges through triple mode of action.
master_descriptions.urdu: ڈیو پلس اسٹار ایک سلیکٹو پوسٹ ایمرجنس جڑی بوٹی مار دوا ہے جو رِمزلفیوران، کوئزالوفوپ اور بینٹازون پر مشتمل ہے اور گھاس نما، چوڑی پتی اور ڈیلا جڑی بوٹیوں کو کنٹرول کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: ڈیو پلس اسٹار اک پوسٹ ایمرجنس جڑی بوٹی مار اے جس وچ رِمزلفیوران، کوئزالوفوپ تے بینٹازون شامل نیں جو گھاس، چوڑی پتی تے موتھا نوں اک ہی سپرے نال کنٹرول کردا اے۔
